limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No quantified AI-specific spend, headcount, or named vendor/cloud partnerships disclosed in excerpts; ERP investment is described as substantial but not AI-specific and no dollar amounts are provided.

ai_narrative_concreteness: AI use cases are named (productivity, data analytics) but described as in early assessment phases with no deployment confirmation or quantified results; ERP system is the most concrete initiative but is not AI-specific.

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Risk-section material is present and contains named AI risk categories with described mechanisms (reputational, financial, compliance harm); scored 4 rather than 5 as no quantification of risk exposure or named governance/oversight body specific to AI is disclosed.
